节点.功能描述: Provides methods to operate or manage NFC tag.
Absolute URI as defined in RFC 3986 [RFC 3986]
NfcForum Type definition. The NDEF tag may use one of them.
RTD type TEXT, see NFC Record Type Definition (RTD) Specification.
RTD type URI, see NFC Record Type Definition (RTD) Specification.
5 sectors per tag, 4 blocks per sector
16 sectors per tag, 4 blocks per sector
32 sectors per tag, 4 blocks per sector
40 sectors per tag, 4 blocks per sector

Obtains an {@link NfcATag} object based on the tag information.

During tag reading, if the tag supports the NFC-A technology, an {@link NfcATag} object will be created based on the tag information.
注释信息: @param { TagInfo } tagInfo Indicates the tag information.

parameters.说明: Indicates the tag information.

节点.功能描述:

2. Incorrect parameters types.

节点.功能描述: Set reader mode enabled when the specific application is on foreground and set card presence interval. Tag infomation will be dispatched to the application only if a NFC tag is discovered. From {@link NFC_A} to {@link MIFARE_ULTRALIGHT}.
注释信息: @param { 'readerModeWithInterval' } type - The callback type to be registered.
@param { ElementName } elementName - The element name of application, must include the bundleName and abilityName.
@param { number[] } discTech - The technologies list to set for discovering.
@param { Callback<TagInfo> } callback - The callback to dispatched the TagInfo object for application.
@param { number } interval - The interval for reader presence check.
@throws { BusinessError } 3100201 - The tag running state is abnormal in the service.
@throws { BusinessError } 3100202 - The element state is invalid.

parameters.说明: The callback type to be registered.
The element name of application, must include the bundleName and abilityName.
The technologies list to set for discovering.

The interval for reader presence check.

The element state is invalid.

节点.功能描述:
Provides tag information.

This class provides the technology a tag supports, for example, NFC-A. Applications can create different tags based on the supported technology.
The uid of this tag, it.
The supported technology list of this tag.
The supported technology list of this tag.
